entry.title: Healthy Seeds Mix rich in Vitamin E, healthy fats & Omega-3 for Heart & Brain, Immunity & Bones and Hair & Skin
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Healthy Seeds Mix
Price: 179.00

Made with seeds that carry their own unique benefits, neuherbs Healthy Seeds Mix brings the comprehensive benefits of Pumpkin, Sunflower, Watermelon, Flax and Chia seeds, all packaged in one mix to help you achieve your overall health goals. Being rich in protein, healthy fat, essential vitamins & minerals, neuherbs Healthy Seeds Mix makes a great & healthy option for your untimely hunger cravings. This 5-in-One mix can be enjoyed anytime of the day whether for breakfast with oatmeal & juices or as a late-night munching snack. neuherbs Healthy Seeds Mix can be your wellness companion. Keep it while travelling, going to the office or hiking, it gives you a boost of energy, supports a healthy gut, immunity, heart, brain & bones.

entry.title: Raw Unroasted White Quinoa Seeds Rich in Protein, Iron, Fiber and Gluten Free Helps in cholesterol levels, weight loss and strong Bones
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Quinoa Seeds
Price: 319.00

Quinoa seeds are high in quality protein containing all essential amino acids, gluten-free, and loaded with vitamins & minerals. This means that people with wheat allergies can consume it without worry. They are also rich in magnesium, dietary fiber, vitamin B complex, vitamin E, calcium, and phosphorous, making them a wholesome, filling, and nutrient-dense superfood. In addition, they contain a large number of antioxidants, including flavonoids and phenolic acids. Quinoa seeds organic can help neutralize free radicals that cause oxidative stress in your body, protecting your body’s immune system. Include neuherbs unroasted, raw, organic white quinoa seeds to your diet and experience enhanced benefits – from managing weight to building muscles. It is an exceptional plant-based complete protein source for vegans and vegetarians. This is one of its unique qualities, as the majority of plant proteins are not complete proteins except quinoa.  In fact, it contains more protein, fat, and fiber than other grains.

entry.title: Organic Chia Seeds for Weight Loss & Boost Health
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Organic Chia Seeds
Price: 349.00 - 699.00 (2 variants)

Chia Seeds are a powerhouse of nutrients, primarily dietary fiber, omega –3 fatty acids, protein, magnesium, calcium, and antioxidants. These essential nutrients help manage weight, strengthen bones, regulate blood sugar levels, and improve skin health. Rich in both fiber and protein, including chia seeds in your daily diet can effectively curb hunger pangs, potentially reducing chances of overeating and late-night cravings. Rich in Omega 3 fatty acids and high in antioxidants, neuherbs  natural, raw & unroasted chia seeds offer a powerful punch of nutritional wellness. Our chia seeds for weight loss are premium grade and sourced organically from the best farms in India. Chia seeds have a mild nutty flavour and can be used in smoothies, oatmeal toppings, salads, or porridges, or can be added in water as well. You can also add neuherbs Chia Seeds to baked goods for tasty yet healthy nutritional punch.

entry.title: Raw Unroasted Flax Seeds naturally rich in Omega-3 fatty acids Helps in cholesterol levels, weight loss or management and strong Bones
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Organic Flax Seeds
Price: 299.00

If a healthy snack option is what you seek, which can not only reduce your hunger but also provide essential nutrients, neuherbs  flax seeds are your answer.  neuherbs ’ organic, raw, and unroasted flax seeds provide Omega-3 fatty acids, like ALA, protein, calcium, and fiber. This makes it a fantastic meal maker for weight loss management and optimal heart health. It can help reduce inflammation, manage cholesterol levels, and regulate BP. The soluble fiber in neuherbs flaxseeds helps slow down digestion, regulate blood sugar levels, and reduce hunger, while the insoluble fiber promotes better bowel movements. You can add neuherbs Organic Flaxseeds to your smoothies, overnight oats, burger dough, bread dough, pancake batter, and nutrition bars or you can have them raw as your go-to snack, to avail maximum benefits for your health.

entry.title: Organic Sunflower Seeds are rich in Vitamin E, unsaturated fatty acids, potassium & naturally sodium-free helps in heart & skin health
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Organic Sunflower Seeds
Price: 599.00

neuherbs Sunflower Seeds are a rich source of Vitamin E, unsaturated fatty acids, potassium, and anti-inflammatory properties that play a significant role in helping you manage common health problems, including body inflammation, skin issues, & heart health. Magnesium and unsaturated fatty acids like PUFA & MUFA present in sunflower seeds are known to maintain healthy blood pressure levels, and lower bad cholesterol levels when consumed regularly. The sunflower seeds also contain Vitamin B6, B5, Zinc, Protein, Manganese, and Selenium in small amounts. neuherbs  sunflower seeds, organically cultivated in the best Indian farms, are rich in Vitamin E that functions as an essential antioxidant that protects your body from oxidative stress caused by free radical damage. These antioxidants also help reduce inflammation. neuherbs sunflower seeds are deshelled so that you can have them without effort. Sunflower seeds make a perfect, guilt-free snack.

entry.title: Organic Pumpkin Seeds: Raw, Unroasted for Energy Boost
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Pumpkin Seeds
Price: 949.00

Indian pumpkin seeds are highly nutritious and are associated with multiple health benefits, including heart and brain health. Pumpkin seeds can also promote restful sleep. neuherbs unroasted, raw pumpkin seeds are sourced ethically from the best organic farms in India.  The pumpkin seeds contain potassium, magnesium, fiber, zinc, iron, healthy fats, and protein. They are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acid, which are essential antioxidants. The seeds also contain a very essential amount of Vitamin E.  Pumpkin seeds can be easily added to your daily diet. They can be eaten as evening snacks, either raw or roasted with spices or just salt. Taking pumpkin seeds regularly may help you manage many dietary problems. It may protect you from various health problems, including lowering cholesterol levels, improving energy, optimizing immune function, controlling blood sugar, improving digestive health, and regulating mood.
